A new wave of reforms is opening the door to greater private investment in clean power, storage and grid infrastructure after years of subdued activity, creating one of the region’s largest energy transition opportunities. The shift comes against a complex geopolitical backdrop. As negotiations over the US-Mexico-Canada Agreement continue, Mexico is balancing its deep integration with North American supply chains against a desire to dive

title: China’s Protests Harder to Track Amid Economic Pain, Report Says
title_cn: 报告称，在经济困难的情况下，中国的抗议活动更难追踪
summary: Beijing’s intensified censorship campaign is increasingly obscuring signs of social unrest, according to China Dissent Monitor, resulting in a sharp drop in documented incidents even as economic pressures continue to fuel protests across the country.

title: Nickel Hits Three-Week High on Indonesia Supply Risks, Fed View
title_cn: 美联储认为印尼供应风险导致镍价触及三周高位
summary: Nickel jumped to a three-week high as expectations for Federal Reserve interest-rate hikes faded, while uncertainty over mining policy in top producer Indonesia clouded the supply outlook.

title: US Stocks Slip as AI Rally Faces Fresh Scrutiny: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 随着人工智能反弹面临新的审查，美国股市下滑：市场总结
summary: Stocks mirrored the cautious moves across most asset classes as traders considered whether earnings justified further advances in the artificial intelligence trade and uncertainty swirled around the Middle East.

title: Gold Declines as Fresh US Strikes on Iran Fuel Inflation Fears
title_cn: 由于美国对伊朗的新打击加剧了通胀担忧，金价下跌
summary: Gold declined, erasing a moderate gain from the previous session, as escalating tensions in the Middle East fueled concerns that energy prices and inflation will stay high.

title: Latest Oil Market News and Analysis for July 16
title_cn: 7 月 16 日最新石油市场新闻和分析
summary: Oil eased after a three-day rally as the US carried out another round of airstrikes on Iran, following a series of shipping attacks by the Islamic Republic this week.

title: French Power Exports Jump 36% to Record on Nuclear Output Boost
title_cn: 法国电力出口因核电输出猛增 36% 创历史新高
summary: French power exports surged to a record in the first half of 2026 as a rebound in nuclear output and rising renewable generation left the country with a big surplus of low-cost electricity to sell across Europe.

title: Broker Alpaca Raises $435 Million, Explores Prime Broking Entry
title_cn: 经纪商 Alpaca 融资 4.35 亿美元，探索进入大宗经纪业务
summary: Brokerage and financial infrastructure startup Alpaca has raised $135 million in equity and $300 million in debt, as it looks to expand a business that helps investors trade across financial markets using artificial intelligence agents.

title: DCC Gets Sweetened Bid From KKR, ECP After Drawn-Out Talks
title_cn: 经过漫长的谈判后，DCC 获得 KKR 和 ECP 的更高报价
summary: KKR & Co. and Energy Capital Partners have sweetened their bid for DCC Plc to more than £5.7 billion ($7.7 billion) and bought extra time to complete what’s become a drawn-out takeover process.

title: TSMC Says AI Boom Will Go Another Three Years, Defying Skeptics
title_cn: 台积电称人工智能热潮将再持续三年，无视怀疑论者
summary: The chipmaker is sharply increasing its capital spending and sales projections for the year.

title_cn: 大众基金拖累资产增长，合众集团股价暴跌
summary: Partners Group Holding AG shares slumped after the Swiss manager of private equity and credit funds said client redemptions from its popular evergreen vehicles weighed on growth in the first half.

title: Goldman’s Bell Sees More Gains for Europe’s AI Buildout Stocks
title_cn: 高盛贝尔认为欧洲人工智能建设股票将上涨
summary: Europe’s AI infrastructure shares have further to run as hyperscalers are expected to increase spending again next year, according to Goldman Sachs Group Inc.’s Sharon Bell.

title: Spain’s Naturgy to Build $344 Million Australia Renewables Plant
title_cn: 西班牙 Naturgy 将耗资 3.44 亿美元在澳大利亚建造可再生能源工厂
summary: Spanish energy firm Naturgy Energy Group SA said its Australian unit will invest more than 300 million euros ($344 million) to build its largest renewables project in the country, combining solar power and battery storage.

title: Wheat Hits Two-Year High as Black Sea Attacks Spur Supply Fears
title_cn: 黑海袭击引发供应担忧，小麦价格创两年新高
summary: Wheat futures hit a two-year high as ongoing Ukrainian and Russian strikes in the Black Sea threatened a key export route for both countries.

title: Emerging Stocks Slump as Korea Curbs Fan Selloff in Chip Giants
title_cn: 韩国遏制芯片巨头粉丝抛售，新兴股市暴跌
summary: Emerging-market stocks resumed their slide, snapping a two-day rally, as SK Hynix Inc. and Samsung Electronics Co. tumbled after South Korean authorities moved to rein in leveraged funds tracking the chipmakers.

title: Pound Hits One-Year High as Fiscal Fears Ease, Bears Retreat
title_cn: 财政担忧缓解，空头撤退，英镑触及一年高点
summary: Sterling hit its strongest level in a year as speculation incoming Prime Minister Andy Burnham will name a markets-friendly Chancellor of the Exchequer accelerated a shift away from bearish positions on the UK currency.

title: South Korea to Halt New Listings of Single Stock Leveraged ETFs
title_cn: 韩国将停止新上市单一股票杠杆ETF
summary: South Korea will temporarily halt new listings of single-stock leveraged exchange traded products to curb market volatility after a surge in popularity of funds tied to Samsung Electronics Co. and SK Hynix Inc.

title: Asian Gas Prices Near Four-Month High on Mideast Tensions
title_cn: 中东紧张局势导致亚洲天然气价格接近四个月高点
summary: Asian liquefied natural gas prices rose to the highest since late March as fresh hostilities in the Middle East deepened concerns that shipping through the key Strait of Hormuz will remain disrupted for longer.

title: Ocado CEO Steiner Digs In as Warehouse Tech Unit Falters
title_cn: Ocado 首席执行官 Steiner 深入探讨仓库技术部门的动摇
summary: Ocado Group Plc Chief Executive Officer Tim Steiner said he’s committed to leading the British grocery delivery company, even as another weak performance from its key technology division triggered a share plunge.

title: Why Soccer Analytics Works Like Volatility Arbitrage Trading
title_cn: 为什么足球分析的作用类似于波动性套利交易
summary: Soccer's embrace of the "moneyball" revolution.

title: BHP Iron Ore Workers Stage First Hedland Strike Since 2000
title_cn: 必和必拓铁矿石工人自 2000 年以来首次举行 Hedland 罢工
summary: Workers at BHP Group’s Port Hedland operations in Western Australia staged the first strike at the company’s Pilbara iron ore hub since 2000, after last-ditch talks failed to avert industrial action.

title: AI Companion Bots and Virtual Lovers Face China Crackdown
title_cn: 人工智能伴侣机器人和虚拟恋人面临中国打压
summary: Beijing is shunning virtual lovers, which had grown into a popular social substitute

title: Japan to Buy Nvidia Rubin Chips to Build an AI for Robots
title_cn: 日本将购买 Nvidia Rubin 芯片来构建机器人人工智能
summary: Japan is planning to buy 27,500 next-generation Rubin chips from Nvidia Corp. to build a homegrown foundational AI model for robots.

title: Vital Signals Announces $399 Signal Ring That Gives Blood Pressure Readings
title_cn: Vital Signals 推出售价 399 美元的信号环，可提供血压读数
summary: A three-year-old startup says it has produced a smart ring that can track blood pressure as accurately as a traditional arm cuff and that — eventually — it could be able to make medical diagnoses. If the company, called Vital Signals, can successfully deliver on the promise, it would represent a significant breakthrough in consumer wearables.

title: China Sends Robots Into the World to Learn How to Be Human
title_cn: 中国将机器人送到世界各地学习如何做人
summary: In an industrial park on the outskirts of Beijing, a humanoid arm picks up a bag of Lay’s potato chips and places it neatly along a row of snacks on a shelf. Nearby, a worker films himself grabbing cushions off a sofa and folding sheets on a bed, recording videos that will be used to develop brains for robots.

title: AI Needs Radiologists as Much as Radiologists Need AI
title_cn: 人工智能需要放射科医生，就像放射科医生需要人工智能一样
summary: AI can make mistakes, and that’s a red line in healthcare.

summary: Digi Spain Telecom SA shares opened higher their debut in Spain on Thursday, completing a rare initial public offering in the country.

title: Messi Defending World Cup Title Would Boost US Sportsbooks Too
title_cn: 梅西卫冕世界杯冠军也将提振美国体育博彩
summary: If Lionel Messi leads Argentina to an upset victory against Spain in its World Cup title defense this weekend, it will cap a profitable final stretch of games for US betting firms.

title: Atlas Copco Orders Soar on Momentum in Chipmaking-Exposed Unit

summary: Atlas Copco AB’s orders blew past expectations on growing momentum at its chipmaking-exposed business, cementing the Swedish industrial company’s spot as a key beneficiary of the artificial intelligence boom.

title: ASML Mulls Price Hike for Chipmaking Tools, Information Says
title_cn: 消息称 ASML 正在考虑提高芯片制造工具的价格
summary: ASML Holding NV plans to raise prices for its chipmaking equipment, setting up a potential clash with its biggest customer Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co., according to a report in the Information citing people familiar with the matter.

title: Baidu to Upgrade Hong Kong Listing Status to Attract Capital
title_cn: 百度提升香港上市地位以吸引资本
summary: Baidu Inc. plans to pursue a dual primary listing in the US and Hong Kong, a move that will allow it to tap mainland Chinese investors.

title: TSMC Hikes Sales, Spending Outlook to Catch AI ‘Megatrend’
title_cn: 台积电提高销售额和支出前景以赶上人工智能“大趋势”
summary: Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co. raised its spending and revenue projections for the year, reflecting its confidence that torrid growth in demand for chips and data centers will extend into 2027 and beyond.

title: Uber Agrees to Buy Delivery Hero in $14.8 Billion Deal
title_cn: Uber 同意以 148 亿美元收购 Delivery Hero
summary: Uber Technologies Inc. has agreed to buy Delivery Hero SE in a deal that values the German food-delivery company at $14.8 billion and dramatically expands the US firm’s global operations.

title: Hyundai to Buy SoftBank Boston Dynamics Stake in Robot Push
title_cn: 现代汽车将收购软银波士顿动力公司机器人推送股份
summary: Hyundai Motor Co. and its affiliates are moving to acquire SoftBank Group Corp.’s remaining stake in the automaker’s Boston Dynamics unit, securing full ownership of the robotics pioneer at a steep discount as it prepares to deploy its Atlas humanoid robot on factory floors.

title: Brookfield-Backed Data-Center Firm Raises $1.05 Billion in IPO
title_cn: Brookfield 支持的数据中心公司通过 IPO 筹集 10.5 亿美元
summary: Csquare Inc. raised $1.05 billion after pricing its initial public offering below a marketed range on Wednesday.

title: TSMC to Spend $265 Billion on US Buildout in Key Trump Deal
title_cn: 台积电将斥资 2650 亿美元在美国扩建，这是特朗普的关键协议
summary: Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co. plans to spend an additional $100 billion to expand US chipmaking capacity, formalizing a pledge that’s part of a larger deal between Washington and Taipei to bring semiconductor manufacturing to American soil.

title: S. Africa Finance Chief Reviews $219 Billion Fund CEO Suspension
title_cn: 南非财政部长审查 2190 亿美元基金首席执行官停职
summary: South Africa’s finance minister said the board of the continent’s biggest money manager briefed the government on a decision to suspend its chief executive officer over alleged governance issues and that it will assess the information after talks with those involved.

title: Japan’s Robotics Leaders Unite With Nvidia to Take On China
title_cn: 日本机器人领导者与 Nvidia 联手挑战中国
summary: Fujitsu Ltd., Fanuc Corp. and two of Japan’s biggest robotics companies will work together in robot development, a move aimed at staying ahead of surging competition from China.

title: China Internet Stocks Catch an AI Lift as Beijing Warms to Tech
title_cn: 随着北京热衷科技，中国互联网股票迎来人工智能上涨
summary: China’s internet stocks are mounting a comeback after a prolonged period of lagging the broader market, buoyed by improving earnings expectations, signs of policy support and optimism around the country’s artificial intelligence progress.

title: Nvidia’s Huang Courts Japanese AI Suppliers With Pork Skewers
title_cn: 英伟达黄仁勋用猪肉串吸引日本人工智能供应商
summary: On Wednesday night, Jensen Huang was in Tokyo’s central Kanda district courting the little-known Japanese suppliers that underpin the AI supply chain.

title: Palm Beach Strikes Down Data Center Plan After Local Backlash
title_cn: 在当地强烈反对后，棕榈滩取消了数据中心计划
summary: Palm Beach County commissioners rejected a proposal late Wednesday to build a digital infrastructure hub to house AI data centers and warehouses, voting in line with the ardent opposition from local residents.

title: Iran-US Hostilities Worsen as Hormuz Shipping Traffic Falls
title_cn: 霍尔木兹海峡航运量下降，伊朗与美国的敌对行动加剧
summary: The US intensified strikes against Iran, hitting an oil tanker near the country’s main export terminal for the first time since the restart of the blockade on the Islamic Republic’s ports.

title: Iraq Pauses Basrah Oil Loadings After Drone Attack on Tanker
title_cn: 无人机袭击油轮后伊拉克暂停巴士拉石油装载
summary: Iraq suspended oil-loading operations at its Basrah export installations in the Persian Gulf after a tanker was struck by a drone there, a person with knowledge of the matter said.

title: UK Minister Urges FIFA to Probe Argentina’s Falklands Banner
title_cn: 英国大臣敦促国际足联调查阿根廷福克兰群岛旗帜
summary: Football’s governing body FIFA should investigate whether the Argentinian team breached its rules by waving a banner in support of their country’s claim to the Falkland Islands after defeating England in the World Cup semi-finals, a UK government minister said.

title: Meloni Wins Lower House Backing for Electoral Reform Bill
title_cn: 梅洛尼赢得下议院对选举改革法案的支持
summary: Prime Minister Giorgia Meloni overcame government infighting to win lower house approval for an Italian electoral reform bill that is one of her top legislative priorities.

title: Xi Scores a Soft-Power Win Over Trump as Pew Survey Shows China Gain on US
title_cn: 皮尤调查显示中国领先美国，习近平软实力战胜特朗普
summary: Pew survey shows people view China more positively than the US for the first time in almost 20 years.

title: Ukraine Hit Two Large Russia-Linked Oil Tankers in Black Sea
title_cn: 乌克兰在黑海击中两艘与俄罗斯有关的大型油轮
summary: Ukrainian naval drones hit two large Russia-linked oil tankers in the Black Sea as Moscow and Kyiv expand the scope of their mutual maritime strikes.

title: Merz Is Inching Germany Toward Backing EU Push Against China
title_cn: 默茨正在推动德国支持欧盟针对中国的行动
summary: German Chancellor Friedrich Merz is finally showing some openness to backing the European Union’s push against China.

title: Zelenskyy Picks Energy CEO for Premier as Kyiv Eyes Winter
title_cn: 基辅迎来冬季，泽连斯基任命能源首席执行官为总理
summary: President Volodymyr Zelenskyy named the head of a state-run energy company as Ukraine’s next prime minister, underscoring his focus on preparing for the coming winter under the threat of Russian attacks.

title: Iran’s Top Negotiator Defends US Peace Talks Against Hardliners
title_cn: 伊朗最高谈判代表捍卫美国针对强硬派的和平谈判
summary: Iran’s lead negotiator defended diplomatic efforts to end the war, pushing back against hardliners urging him to abandon a tentative peace deal and avenge the country’s slain supreme leader.

title: EU Top Court Backs Amnesty for Catalan Independence Leaders
title_cn: 欧盟最高法院支持对加泰罗尼亚独立领导人的特赦
summary: The European Union’s top court ruled in favor of a Spanish law granting amnesty to Catalan politicians who held a referendum for the region’s independence in 2017, handing Prime Minister Pedro Sánchez a political boost.

title: Protests Flare in Kyiv Over Ouster of Popular Defense Minister
title_cn: 基辅因罢免受欢迎的国防部长而爆发抗议活动
summary: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy’s dismissal of the popular defense minister, Mykhailo Fedorov, triggered a wave of public criticism, dismay among foreign allies, and protests across the country.

title: Burnham Upsets Labour Left Who Helped Him Become UK Premier
title_cn: 伯纳姆惹恼了帮助他成为英国首相的工党左派
summary: As reports swirl that Home Secretary Shabana Mahmood will be Andy Burnham’s pick for chancellor, the direction of his incoming UK government is causing consternation on the left of the Labour Party before he’s even become prime minister.

title: Iran and Ukraine Bring Limits of Air Campaigns Into Sharp Focus
title_cn: 伊朗和乌克兰使空袭的局限性成为人们关注的焦点
summary: Like many leaders before them, Donald Trump and Vladimir Putin are coming face-to-face with the limits of massive airpower to achieve strategic victory.

title: Russia’s Elite Are Moving Billions Beyond Putin’s Wartime Grasp
title_cn: 俄罗斯精英正在将数十亿美元转移到普京战时控制之外
summary: Several of Russia’s richest people including some close to President Vladimir Putin have moved billions of dollars abroad in the past year after growing concerned about the country’s economy and the government budget.

title: Burnham Warned a Land Tax Would Risk UK Economy If Rushed
title_cn: 伯纳姆警告说，如果仓促征收土地税将给英国经济带来风险
summary: Incoming UK prime minister Andy Burnham has been propelled into power by left-wing members of the ruling Labour Party keen to raise taxes on the wealthy. Many like the sound of a long-standing idea that the former mayor of Greater Manchester has endorsed: a tax on land.

title: Netanyahu Rushes Laws to Lock in Right-wing Allies Before Israel’s Election
title_cn: 内塔尼亚胡在以色列大选前急于制定法律锁定右翼盟友
summary: Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu’s government is passing laws aimed at strengthening his rightist-religious political bloc before tight elections in October.

title: US Signals Modest Hopes for Trump-Xi Summit, Seeks Stability
title_cn: 美国对特习峰会表示不大希望，寻求稳定
summary: US Trade Representative Jamieson Greer signaled modest expectations for a much-anticipated summit between President Donald Trump and China’s Xi Jinping, suggesting the September meeting will focus on assessing current commitments rather than brokering new deals.

title: UK Aims to Deliver Ballistic Missile to Ukraine by Next Year
title_cn: 英国计划明年向乌克兰交付弹道导弹
summary: The UK has signed contracts with multiple companies to develop the country’s first ballistic missile in more than half a century in a bid to both support Ukraine and reduce Europe’s reliance on American weaponry.

title: Hong Kong Police Raid Shops, Arrest Five Over ‘Seditious’ Books
title_cn: 香港警方突击搜查商店并逮捕五名涉嫌“煽动性”书籍的人
summary: Hong Kong police arrested five people on suspicion of displaying and selling “seditious” publications, the government said, in at least the third known case of the city’s national security law being applied against booksellers in four months.

title: China Tops US in Global Favorability Survey for First Time
title_cn: 中国在全球好感度调查中首次超过美国
summary: More people around the world view China more positively than the US for the first time in almost 20 years, according to Pew Research Center, with sentiment shifting even among some of Washington’s allies as the two powers compete for influence globally.
